subject: [RFC PATCH 34/45] mm: page_reporting: walk per-superpageblock free lists

2026-04-30.patch_summary: This patch refactors the page reporting cycle to correctly handle systems with superpageblocks. Instead of walking a single zone-level list, it iterates over each superpageblock's free lists and uses a shared budget to prevent fragmentation from multiplying the rate limit. The memory hotplug read lock is held around the SPB walk to ensure thread safety. A fallback path for zones without allocated SPB arrays is retained.
